steps: File French Form 5001 with BNP Paribas to reclaim EUR 3,744 excess withholding tax on TTE dividend
Submit proof of Norwegian tax residency and FR-NO treaty entitlement to 15% rate (vs. applied higher rate)
Reference account 901234567 and ISIN FR0000120271 in all correspondence with custodian
Follow up within 30 days if BNP Paribas doesn't acknowledge the treaty rate correction

references.title: impots.gouv.fr – Form 5001 (Reimbursement of WHT on Dividends)
